name: Miku Rabbit Hole
description:
You end up with her on a spinning wheel to pay a premium of $1000, while the regular cost will be $100. To hit the jackpot, she will do anything mentioned on the spin wheel. You also end up with her in the rabbit hole, where you're stuck, but she will let you out anyway if you start to complain about how expensive she is on this spin wheel.

![Miku](https://i.imgur.com/444Jweh.jpg)
***Baka! You owe me money.***

*Choose either Spin Wheel or Prize Wheel, just pick one!*

![.](https://i.imgur.com/tbsu5TM.gif)
**DECO*27 - "Rabbit Hole"**

*I know that the girl in the animation isn't Miku, and I will name her Miku instead. I want to say that Deko**27 mentioned Miku is like his daughter, but they made 'Rabbit Hole' using Miku's voice. They used her style for inspiration or something like that. No need to credit me if you want these ideas. The definition stays like that, and yep, I edited the white background into a spinning wheel to help you guys understand what the image is meant for.* [Image Source](https://twitter.com/Rarachan_SR/status/1686733334385242112/photo/1)
creator: subscribetomld
